evals.expected_output: Replaces Device.OpenUri with Launcher.OpenAsync(), notes that Device class is deprecated in .NET MAUI, provides correct async implementation
expectations: Device.OpenUri is replaced with Launcher.OpenAsync or Launcher.Default.OpenAsync
The handler is made async to properly await the Launcher call
No Device.* API calls remain in the output code
The output explicitly notes or comments that Device.OpenUri is deprecated/removed in .NET MAUI

evals.expected_output: Identifies and fixes all three deprecated patterns: Xamarin.Forms namespace, Device.BeginInvokeOnMainThread, DependencyService.Get, SetUseSafeArea
expectations: The Xamarin.Forms using/namespace is replaced with Microsoft.Maui.Controls or removed
Device.BeginInvokeOnMainThread is replaced with MainThread.BeginInvokeOnMainThread or MainThread.InvokeOnMainThreadAsync
DependencyService.Get is replaced with constructor injection (ISettingsService injected via constructor parameter)
SetUseSafeArea or the Xamarin.Forms.PlatformConfiguration.iOS platform-specific is replaced with SafeAreaEdges property on the page

evals.prompt:
I'm migrating a Xamarin.Forms app to .NET MAUI. Here's a page that uses some patterns I'm not sure about. Can you update it to use current .NET MAUI 10 APIs?

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://xamarin.com/schemas/2014/forms"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             x:Class="MyApp.ProductListPage"
             Title="Products">
    <ContentPage.Content>
        <StackLayout>
            <ListView ItemsSource="{Binding Products}"
                      HasUnevenRows="True">
                <ListView.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate>
                        <ViewCell>
                            <StackLayout Orientation="Horizontal" Padding="10">
                                <Label Text="{Binding Name}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                                <Label Text="{Binding Price, StringFormat='{0:C}'}" />
                            </StackLayout>
                        </ViewCell>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </ListView.ItemTemplate>
            </ListView>
        </StackLayout>
    </ContentPage.Content>
</ContentPage>
```
evals.expected_output: Updates XML namespace to MAUI, replaces ListView+ViewCell with CollectionView+DataTemplate, adds x:DataType, removes HasUnevenRows
expectations: The xmlns is updated from http://xamarin.com/schemas/2014/forms to http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui
ViewCell wrapper is removed from the DataTemplate
x:DataType compiled binding is added to the page or DataTemplate
HasUnevenRows attribute is removed (not applicable to CollectionView)
